@Secrets4stocks @ALikhodedov @ericnuttall That's correct. 

They offered 170 mm barrels; 133 mm were pledged. DOE has offered another 40 mm barrels. All of that will be replaced under the terms of the deal with interest in the form of barrels (<105% total). 

The timeframe for returning the loans is 2027 to 2029.
